summary: Google Analytics GA4 custom event tracking code review completed. All required analytics imports and function calls verified across 10 frontend pages.
critical_code_review_comments: All analytics tracking implementations verified as correctly implemented
analytics.js utility file properly structured with trackSignup, trackLogin, trackGeneration, trackDownload, trackPurchaseStart, trackPurchaseComplete, setUserId functions
GA4 Measurement ID G-X4Y9E4QSF8 correctly configured in both analytics.js and index.html
GifMaker.js - trackGeneration and trackDownload calls present
PhotoToComic.js - trackGeneration calls for both avatar and strip modes, trackDownload call present
AuthCallback.js - trackSignup('google') and setUserId calls present
Login.js - trackLogin('email') and setUserId calls present
Signup.js - trackSignup('email') and setUserId calls present
Billing.js - trackPurchaseStart and trackPurchaseComplete calls present
index.html - gtag script correctly loaded with G-X4Y9E4QSF8 measurement ID
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Analytics GA4 event tracking implemented across all required pages. Events tracked: sign_up, login, generate_content, download, begin_checkout, purchase. All imports and function calls verified through code review.
